# mappingType

**Instance Property**

The mapping type for the entity mapping.

## Declaration

```swift
var mappingType: NSEntityMappingType { get set }
```

## Discussion

If you specify a custom entity mapping type, you must specify a value for the migration policy class name as well (see [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSEntityMapping/entityMigrationPolicyClassName]).

## Managing Mapping Information

- **name**: The name of the entity mapping.
- **entityMigrationPolicyClassName**: The class name of the migration policy for the entity mapping.
- **attributeMappings**: The array of attribute mappings for the entity mapping.
- **relationshipMappings**: The array of relationship mappings for the entity mapping.
- **userInfo**: The user info dictionary for the entity mapping.
